title: HOTUT Baby Pram Blanket, 75x100cm, Soft Plush, Animal Print, Unisex, Cotton, Squirrel Color, Perfect for Baby, Toddler, Crib, Cot, Stroller, Kids, Newborn Gifts
features: DUAL-LAYER DESIGN: The front and the back are designed differently, the printed fabric on the front is very soft. The back is a microfleece fabric with bumps, which is more suitable for your baby's delicate skin, allowing your baby to fall asleep and sleep through the night. Different types of prints offer different styles to bring different moods to your baby

DURABLE AND SAFE: Baby blanket made of high quality fabric, super soft, comfortable and warm, polka dots give your baby a good touch, the fabric provides a warm and soft feeling for your baby and toddler, friendly to baby's delicate skin, durable and safe

SIZE FOR DIFFERENT SCENARIOS: The 75x100cm will last well through baby to toddler and beyond. The right size is perfect for cots, prams, car seats, naps and daycare. It's also great for pet beds; adults can cover their legs to rest in the office or when travelling

MULTIFUNCTIONAL BABY DOWN COVER: The cute silky plush baby blanket is light enough to stay breathable but very warm so your baby won't get as hot or sweaty as a summer blanket, and warm enough for winter. This is a quality gift for your baby

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Baby blankets must be washed gently in the washing machine in cold water. Avoid fabric softeners and bleach! Tumble dry at low temperature, do not iron, do not dry clean. Proper washing will safely care for your baby's sensitive skin
description: HOTUT Baby Blanket Use as a newborn swaddle blanket or crib blanket to wrap your little one in. Plush polka dots on the fleece surface soothe your baby when you're not around. Features: 1. The front and the back are designed differently, the printed fabric on the front is very soft. The back is a microfleece fabric with bumps. 2. Our soft baby blankets with double polka dot backing are very soft and medium thickness. Perfect for use as a swaddle blanket, crib blanket, pram seat blanket, pram blanket and daycare nap blanket. 3. The cute silky plush baby blanket is light enough to stay breathable but very warm so your baby won't get as hot or sweaty as a summer blanket. 4. Simply throw it in the washing machine. It stays in good condition even after multiple washes. Save your time and maintain hygiene. 5. Great gift for newborn baby girls / infants / toddlers / pets / dogs / cats etc. Baby shower/ Christmas / Birthday / New Year / Receiving Gift. Specification: Material: Cotton Size: 75*100CM Note: 1. Wash before use it, it is softer for babies. 2. Wash at 40 degrees on a delicate cycle. 3. Do not dry Clean, iron or bleach. 4. Tumble dry on low setting.
